summary:
PROPHETIC WARNINGS AND CENSORSHIP: Brandon shares predictions regarding a massive increase in media censorship and AI-driven fact-checking leading up to the 2026 and 2028 elections. Brandon foresees intense attacks on the First Amendment, freedom of speech, and specific lawsuits targeting Elon Musk and the X platform, particularly originating from Europe. Additionally, Brandon warns of upcoming political scandals, likening them to Watergate and the Monica Lewinsky affair, designed to derail the momentum of the Republican Party and the White House.

SHAKINGS IN THE CHURCH AND POLITICS: Brandon outlines a divine shaking set to begin in 2026, primarily judging the house of the Lord. Brandon predicts the exposure of deep corruption within mega-churches, especially in California, resulting in elders and preachers collapsing directly on their platforms across various denominations. Brandon also details a shift in the religious advisory staff surrounding Donald Trump, noting the introduction of veteran prayer warriors like Kevin Zadai to combat intense demonic pressures and witchcraft originating from Cuban leadership that is physically and spiritually weighing Trump down. Brandon emphasizes the necessity of intercessory prayer to help Trump navigate critical decisions, describing Trump's strategic mindset as a high-level chess game requiring divine wisdom.

GLOBAL CONFLICT AND ANTICHRIST AGENDAS: Brandon reveals visions of Iranian leadership conspiring with scientists and religious figures to launch a devastating attack on Israel using a single nuclear bomb and biological weapons inherited from Saddam Hussein. Brandon links Jared Kushner and Emmanuel Macron to an emerging Antichrist spirit, detailing dark rituals and human sacrifices occurring in Berlin to summon the Mahdi. Brandon anticipates a dramatic rise in anti-Semitism, prompting a massive return of Jewish people to Israel, alongside accelerated global labor pains surrounding upcoming Passover seasons.

FUTURE PLAGUES AND DIVINE HEALING: Brandon warns of a forthcoming global plague, described as a dramatically magnified version of the recent pandemic, capable of killing hundreds of millions. In response, Brandon envisions true believers adorned in white suits with a spiritual honey glow, operating under the power of the Holy Ghost to miraculously heal the sick and raise people from their deathbeds, reminiscent of historical healing ministries.

COSMIC DISTURBANCES AND GOVERNMENT DECEPTIONS: Brandon prophesies significant astronomical anomalies, including a strange haze altering the sun's appearance and confusing animal migration patterns. Brandon vividly describes asteroids or comets crashing into the Atlantic Ocean near Africa, causing the waters to fiercely boil and prompting global elites, such as Mark Zuckerberg, to retreat to underground bunkers. Brandon asserts that governments will use phenomena like the newly established aliens website and staged UFO sightings over the Vatican and Mayan temples to enact a grand demonic deception, distracting the public from the implementation of AI and the mark of the beast.

DIVINE RESTITUTION AND CHURCH UNITY: Brandon shares a profound message regarding God's intention to heal generational traumas and bring divine justice to marginalized groups, specifically mentioning Native Americans, African Americans, and victims of slavery like Harriet Tubman. Brandon asserts that God will make past wrongs right, restoring stolen wealth and uprooting roots of bitterness. This spiritual restitution, Brandon explains, is essential for dismantling racial dividing walls and uniting the global church for an unprecedented end-time revival encompassing Ireland, Cuba, Hawaii, and beyond.
rawData: [March 19, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/vsqXfAy4rxk]-[Thank you for joining us again tonight. Like I said, we got a new microphone; let us know what you think about the new audio. Braden's been working on it all afternoon trying to make sure that it works well because he got a new mic, so we're excited about those changes. New changes, little at a time. What was I saying? Let's go over some of the things that we saw yesterday. We haven't had a lot of time, like I said, to check the news today because it is Megan's birthday, so we haven't been doing a lot of research. But there's news out. I guess there are a lot of rumors saying that they believe Benjamin is still passed away. Then I hear other things saying that the rumor is that he's still alive. Then we have Paul Begley, who said something about him being still alive. You don't know what to believe anymore; there's so much fake news. The Lord told us this was coming, ladies and gentlemen. He said that 2026 would start off this way by summertime, going into 2027 and 2028, and that they would put a squeeze on all the fake media and fake news. They would use fact-checkers. The Lord said the fact-checkers are coming out huge in 2028 for the election. It will be so overwhelming that the AI channels are going to squash this. From what I see coming, laws are being put into place for censorship—really coming against your First Amendment rights in America and freedom of speech. I saw that it would happen a lot in Europe and that they would come after Elon Musk and the X platform. There's going to be a lot coming against him in Europe and other nations like Russia. The way I looked at it, it was all up toward the European area. When this happens, I saw a lot of people going to X, but a lot of lawsuits coming against X and Elon for freedom of speech in those countries, banning him from allowing those to be in their nations. Then I saw a Watergate-type scandal coming with the Republican Party. The Lord said, 'You must pray against a new Watergate like Nixon, but it would be worse.' They would try to use this to derail momentum in the Republican Party in the days ahead. A new Monica Lewinsky or Marilyn Monroe type of scandal would try to come out in the White House. The Lord said specifically to pray against this. We hear in part and see in part. I think it's interesting some of the warnings the Lord gives us. As we've been praying over Cuba and about a major revival coming to Ireland—a great shaking to awaken—I was pretty tired after I finished last night. I told Dina I'm excited about what the Lord is saying about the islands: San Juan, Puerto Rico, St. Thomas, St. Martin, Haiti, and the Dominican Republic. I truly believe we're about to see one of the greatest harvests the world has ever seen. The islands are not left out. We're going to see millions of people coming to the saving knowledge of the Lord Jesus Christ in the days ahead. The Lord said, 'I want you to go over what I showed you about 2026 again.' I know this is going to be redundant for some of you who have heard it over and over again, but it has to be repeated. The Lord said 2026 will be the year of 1 Corinthians 5:5, for judgment begins in the house of the Lord first. He said a great shaking to awaken will be in 2026. I saw five major shakings coming: in the church, in politics, in the earth's crust, in the sky above, and in finances. These will be fearful sights that will bring you to your knees. A great shaking is coming in 2026, the Lord warned me, beginning in the house of the Lord first. He said there will be certain mega-churches in California where corruption will start to be uncovered. The corruption runs deeper than what people think in some churches. You'll see this in California and across America. This is exactly what the Lord said back in October of last year. He said many elders will start to go home—some because they've not listened, and some because it's just their season. As you see these elders go, the Lord said some will fall over on their platforms. I saw some preachers preaching behind the pulpit and just going home right there on stage. The Lord wanted to emphasize this again: it's not just charismatics or non-denominational preachers; it's across the board: Catholics, Baptists, Methodists, Church of Christ, you name it. He said the body of Christ as a whole, judgment begins in the house of the Lord first—a shaking to awaken. As we were praying last night, I saw a shaking with the staff attached to President Trump. I saw a changing in the White House religious staff. I saw new faces and new positions, bringing in a prayer covering from the north, south, east, and west—people stationed as prayer warriors who are veterans in prayer. God was bringing veterans in prayer to surround our president. I believe I'm praying right now for these prayer warriors with influence. I'm not familiar with Kevin Zadai's ministry, but from what I saw, he was invited to the White House and went. I believe he's a praying man. There's going to be people that have integrity and spiritual oomph behind him because of this demonic pressure, even from the leader of Cuba doing some kind of witchcraft against our president with a photo. The Lord said, 'You must carry him across the finish line or he's not going to make it. The church must lift him up and carry him.' He had huge cement blocks on his feet and was dragging them as much as he could. The pressure of the Antichrist agenda and the spirit realm is weighing him down, even destroying his organs. He has an assignment that he must accomplish. He is in the valley of decision. Even as the Lord said concerning Cuba, how will he handle it in the days ahead? He said publicly he could do anything he wanted to do with Cuba. I truly believe God is going to liberate the ten million plus people on that island. We are going to see a major Holy Ghost and fire revival. As we were praying the shaking to awaken over Cuba two nights ago, there was a 5.8 earthquake during that time frame. We were interceding, and the wall in Cuba started to shake. I believe it's confirmation from the Lord. It gives you some encouragement to keep going. We're going to pray for the nations; they're going to be saved. I am praying for a major awakening in Ireland, Cuba, New Zealand, Australia, and places that seem lukewarm, like South Korea. I have expectation. As I went over the visions today, the Lord reminded me about that black gauze that looked like the death angel. It had a face but no body structure. It reminded me of the plague again. He reminded me that COVID was a test run and the next one would be COVID on steroids—a plague that would be released that would kill hundreds of millions this time. I saw the honey glow on the people in white suits, representation of purity. They had the Holy Ghost and fire on them like a honey glow. They went and laid hands on the people and raised them from their deathbeds. The Lord said it's similar to what John G. Lake would do whenever he held the bubonic plague in his hand and the doctor took the froth from the man's mouth. When you're filled with and controlled by the Holy Ghost, walking in shalom and knowing who you are in Christ, I saw people rise up as believing believers who go and lay hands on the sick and they recover. I say all this to prepare you, not to scare you. The Lord said when Passover comes, it will be a time of great acceleration. The labor pains from Passover will double. They increased on September 23rd when the UN took a vote against Israel. I don't believe in replacement theology. I stand for the peace of Jerusalem and the people of Israel. I believe Israel is forever. I believe we're in the end of the end times and Jesus Christ is coming. We need to draw a line in the sand. I see anti-Semitism about to rise, and our Jewish brothers and sisters will flee and go home. But we as believers have to pray for the peace of Jerusalem. I know Jared Kushner is the errand boy for the antichrist. He's going to have a dark cloak around him in the days ahead. And he will run about as the forerunner; the pre-Antichrist is what the Lord said. The antichrist spirit will rest upon Jared Kushner with Emmanuel Macron. Now, Emmanuel Macron's term, I believe, is done this year, but the Lord said even whenever his term is done, there'll be things that he does outside of this. I saw a Hitler-type spirit trying to rise up on these men as they were having these hexes and these seance things they were doing all this underneath in Germany, Berlin. And they were actually—I don't know if the word is conjure up or whatever—they were taking human sacrifice, and I was looking, summoning the Mahdi, summoning the antichrist spirit, the Pergamon Altar, and the things that are associated with it with this staff that Hitler was infatuated with. This staff that this... whatever this thing is. It's like a knife. I believe it's still in Berlin from what I understand. Maybe I'm off on that, but I'm trying to tell you I see this demonic thing. I see these things being used in rituals trying to bring forth this antichrist spirit. So then I hear that this new leader over Iran is saying that he is going to bring... he is the one that is prophetically sworn in by the Quran to bring forth the Mahdi. He believes he is the one that's going to help do this. What did I tell you I saw before all that came out? That's in the news; people are talking about it. I said I saw him underground, and he was talking to a man with a white beard, and he was standing next to a rocket, and it had one load, one major bomb. And I saw them talking and he said, "Do you believe, sir?" I could hear him in here. I was hearing him in English, but he was talking to the man with a white beard and a white turban on his head. And they were talking back and forth and they were going over Islamic prophecy and they were bouncing things back and forth of things that they knew that was in Islamic prophecy. And he said, "Do you truly believe that we're in that time?" The old man said, "Yes, I do. It's time." And they were devising a plan of how to distract the eagle so they could try to give a fatal blow to Israel. And they believed in doing so it would bring forth major war and bring forth the Mahdi. This is what I saw. And they were underground. They were talking to a scientist and they were talking about a megaton, like what was in Hiroshima, and they were talking to him: "Do you believe what we have hidden will work? Do you believe what we have? We have one. Do you believe it will work?" And the scientist said, "I don't see why not. It's not been tested, but we believe we have one working bomb." And I saw one special rocket that was black that was as long as a bus that they were wanting to put this thing on. And I saw them trying to devise a plan. Beside the rocket was barrels full of biological weapons. And the Lord said this came from Saddam. Those were the weapons of mass destruction that they could not find. Some of them went to Iran. I saw things with Y on it. I don't know what it was. I'm not educated in biological stuff. I tell you what I see. But I know some of this was like a mustard gas. And I saw what it did. And it boils and it melted the skin off of your body and it made your back bust in half in convulsions. I saw a very evil plan. And the Lord said, "You must pray for what they say is underneath these mountains." And I saw the mountains. The Lord showed me it was deep underneath them in the northeast. I saw it. So, as we see all this, we pray for the liberation of Cuba. I believe with all my heart our brothers and sisters are about to be liberated. And it will happen in a 24-hour period—not in the next 24-hour period, please hear me—within a 24-hour period, it will be like... and everybody will be celebrating. And from that day forward, what has been a noose around their neck pulling them under will be broken free and they will be liberated and they will have Holy Ghost revival and the satanic cult and all this stuff. There will be a piercing of the demonic veil that has been over that island. The Lord said, "I'm going to bring great revival to the Cuban people." So, I keep saying that out. I keep saying it and I keep telling you and I'm declaring it that Marco Rubio will have his tens of thousands and then there'll be David and then there'll be Saul and he'll have his thousands. What has he done versus him to become 2028? Remember this. What has he done to become 2028? For one will have great accomplishments and the other one looked like a tail rider. That's what I saw. So, we'll see as we keep praying for these things. But right now we need to focus on the task at hand and making sure the Clarity Act gets passed. Clarity Act for a new industrial revolution and for all that to happen, then for them to get the Save America Act done. It passed in the House; we need it to pass in the Senate. They need to get off their ignorance and vote this thing. This shouldn't be a question; we should already have it done. It should be done. We should already have this voted on. And we need to see who the traitors are versus the ones that are for our nation. And the ones that are traitors should be voted out and we'll bring in better people to fill them. If you're a RINO and you're a Republican and you're rebutting against this, shame on you. It's time for you to go. We need to have a better person in your position. And the Lord showed me last night that he was pricking the hearts of pastors, pricking the hearts of people that have positions that would run for office and win by the hand of the Lord. As I was praying for Hawaii last night, I saw a Hawaiian man that he is very respected with the Hawaiian people and he was heavy-looking, but the Lord said it's about culture. It's culture. Now, I am not familiar with Hawaiian culture at all. I know our culture... you call rednecks or whatever you want to call us in Oklahoma, but I'm not familiar with Hawaiian culture. And the Lord said, "I'm going to bring forth someone that will have a great influence on the Hawaiian Islands." And I saw a darkness that was a form of witchcraft over Hawaii. And it was old. It looked very dark, this presence of occultic stuff that was over Hawaii. And I didn't know if they did or not, but the Lord showed me there was some kind of... there's something that's attached to it. But the Lord said he's bringing revival. And as these things happen, I saw major volcanoes erupting in Hawaii. And so, there was a lot too last night. I saw that it would only take one or two people in Ireland that he was raising. I saw a dead man getting up again. I saw blinded eyes opening. I saw ears popping open. And I saw the glory of the Lord coming on Ireland with a major, major move that was going to save a lot of people in the days ahead because signs and wonders will follow them that believe. And so I'm encouraged by some of the things the Lord showed us last night. I have such an anticipation to watch the manifestations of the sons and daughters—realize who they are, the salty ones. So, was that it, Braden? Was that everything about yesterday? Dublin. You saw Dublin, right? I talked about that. Ireland, that was it, right? I think that's it. Yeah. So, hopefully that encourages you. We had 42 people get born again last night and 70-something the night before. So, there's a lot of people coming to the saving knowledge of Jesus through this channel and we're excited about it. It's amazing to see what God has done through just some YouTube broadcast that people would come and give their heart to Jesus Christ. And so what an awesome time we are having just having a prayer channel. Oh, I saw the Lord said, "Call forth the rowers." And I saw a major boat that had paddles like an old Viking boat, like how they would row with the sails, but they would row, like the old boats. Everybody would be there and they would be pushing this massive boat because everybody had a stick and they were all rowing together and pushing and pulling. I saw the way it was in prayer. And the Lord said, "Call for the rowers to come. Call them. These are as we pray together; many hands make light work." And as all of us come and assemble together in prayer, I saw people putting their supply on these rowing boats. And as we were rowing, we were in the end-time church praying forth a major move of God and for everything that we need to happen. But it was all happening. And the Lord said, "It must be birthed in the spiritual before you see it in the natural. But it is birthed through prayer. Pray more. Come up to my throne more. Have more fellowship with me more in the throne room." And as people were rowing this boat, we were all working together with one heart in one accord. Just like it was with the upper room: they come with a sound of a mighty rushing wind, but first they were all in one accord. They were all praying and they were in one accord. And then boom, it came a sound. Boom, the Holy Ghost and fire came. Boom, speaking in tongues. Boom, all this stuff happened. Look what God did. I see that as where we are right now with all of us coming together and boom, here we are and the glory of the Lord as we are rowing this boat in this end-time army, praying forth everything he has for us to do. And I was looking for scripture, and remember I told you all about I saw the babies and they were coming back to the churches. Now I'm not talking about everybody's going to go back to the church where they came from if it's a corrupt church. I'm talking about you had some kind of silly difference and you probably don't even... if you really stopped and thought about it and you said, "Brandon, I don't remember why I left. I have to really think about it. Why did I leave that church? What was I mad about? What was I irritated about? Was there really something there?" And you really can't even give me a real reason why when the Lord assigned you there other than you just were irritated and, "Well, you know what? I didn't like the way he preached, so I got out of there." But you know, God called you there. That's who I'm talking about. Not some kind of scandal where the pastor was doing something bad or whatever and you're like, "I'm out of here." I'm talking about where you know that God had called you there and you still inside of you know there's something there. The Holy Spirit's warning you; he's stirring in you. That's what I'm talking about. But he gave me Psalms 92:13 and 14: "Those that be planted in the house of the Lord shall flourish in the courts of our God. They shall still bring forth fruit in old age; they shall be fat and flourishing." Because they were rooted. And as they are fat and flourishing in the spirit because they are bringing forth great fruit in old age, they're fat and flourishing because they didn't let offense bother them. They didn't allow the rumor mill from Sister Clipboard to tick them off and say, "Well, Sister Clipboard, I heard from the other Sister Clipboard and that Sister Clipboard was talking to that Sister Clipboard, and everybody sitting there being a busybody, and they got over here to you and you heard about what she said..." And relay telephone that came out that I said the color purple and you said it was something else and you don't even know what was said. And the next thing you know, "I'm gone. Well, I'm out of here. I already thought there might be something going on here. I'm out of here." That's what I'm talking about. But the ones that are fat and they're full of fruit—those that be planted in the house of the Lord—we're planted in the church, in the house of the Lord. We're there. We're planted. Shall flourish. We're going to flourish. It didn't say we're going to barely get by. That's why the Bible said that the willing and obedient will eat the good of the land. If you're not eating the good of the land and you're struggling and barely getting by, check your willingness and how obedient you were. Are you willing? It's not just about you doing something; are you willing and obedient? So, check your willingness. Check your thermostat. Am I willing and obedient? Do I qualify to eat the good of the land? The Bible says the willing and obedient will eat the good of the land. And I have to say, you look at yourself and say, "Am I eating the good of the land?" What does that mean? Because the Bible said we could. So, how is it when a lot of people say, "Well, I'm struggling. I got this"? Well, check your thermostat. Am I willing and obedient to what God has called me to do? But a lot of it is that a lot of people have misplaced themselves. You say, "Well, God called you to give to a certain ministry, to a certain church, and you didn't like it. Well, I'm out of here." Well, I go back to being willing and obedient. What did God tell you to do? Not everything is always going to be appeasing to your flesh. So, I check myself all the time. Am I willing and obedient? Because those that are planted in the house of the Lord shall flourish in the courts of our God. I'm going to flourish; I'm going to be filled with and controlled by the Holy Ghost. Even whenever I get offended, I sow seed. Even whenever I get annoyed, I say, "Here, let me bless you. Bless those." You've got to come up higher. And it's not all the time you know your flesh wants to do that. Well, be willing and obedient. So I always say, check where you're planted. Where are you going to church? Where are you in your fellowship with the Lord? Are you going from church to church trying to find a perfect church? Because I'm going to tell you, there is no perfect church. There is no perfect pastor. There is no perfect pastor's wife. There's no perfect deacon board. If you have a deacon board, everybody has issues. Everybody has something they're going through. We're all a work in progress, going from glory to glory. But I'm trying to clean up the church right now, telling you the willing and obedient will eat the good of the land. And I have to check my thermostat. Am I eating the good of the land? Is God taking care of me? Is everything going well? Is my thermostat right with him all the time? You have to check it. Where are you sowing? Where are you giving your tithes and your offerings? Check where you're giving. You have to do that all the time. I do it, Lord; I measure it. And when you're like a farmer that plants, you expect hundredfold, right? A farmer always knows this is where I want to plant. I'm going to sow my seed in this field, and it's either good manure or it's bad soil. But I know that this soil is rich, and if I plant corn, I'm going to get a bumper crop. So I always measure it out. What makes soil good? What makes soil rich? What makes some thirty, some sixty, and a hundredfold? What makes it where some seed doesn't produce at all? Well, bad soil. It's not hard, but we make it hard. We try to make everything so super spiritual. We say, "Well, we've got to fast and pray." I'm not knocking fasting and praying, but I get tired of the excuse where everybody puts up the spiritual wall and they try to make a mountain out of a molehill. Thirty, sixty, hundredfold is when you realize where your sowing is. Is there fruit there? Do you see it? And I know a lot of people criticize megachurches. They criticize things, and God gives the sheep to the people he can trust. I'm not always saying everyone's right in the mega church, but I would say a lot of times when you see it, they're nurturing those babies and bringing them up and at least teaching them something, versus some people that don't. How do you handle what God has given you? The Bible says, "Be faithful over little and he'll make you ruler over much." But people don't want to be faithful over the little God's given them. And God's not going to let you beat the sheep. God's not going to let you beat people. He's going to make sure you're treating them right. And a lot of people don't want to hear that. That's why: be faithful over little; he'll make you ruler over much. How do you handle the sheep God has given you? And so I see and I watch it. And as a watchman, I see a lot more than I say. I just sit and I listen. And the Lord gives me discernment each day. It's not always for you to call it out. It's none of your business; he didn't ask you to do it. A lot of times he's only sent me to a couple of churches and I sat in the back. And the pastor ran back and said, "Who are you?" I said, "The Lord told me judgment's coming to your church." And they look at me and go, "Okay." Like he wants me to leave now. But guess what? Six months later, they're closed. Just like the Lord said, you warn people, and you just keep pushing. I don't have everything always perfect, but I keep pushing. I'm trying. We're getting weight off. We're working out. We're exercising. We're walking around, and I count my steps every day. You know what I'm trying to say. They say 10,000 steps. I'm like, "Oh my gosh, how many steps is that?" They said, "Well, I believe it's 2,000 steps per mile." So, I've been walking and doing my steps and trying to make sure the flesh... and the older you get, the more it's been exciting. Tonight I had salad and they're all eating birthday cake and I was sitting there looking at them going, "This is terrible." I told Braden, I said, "How's that cake taste, boy?" He goes, "You know, Dad, it wasn't that good. Don't worry about it." I said, "It looked good to me." It was from Cheesecake Factory. I said, "Oh, I wanted some so bad." I was there looking at that and Megan had her hands all in it and she's licking her hands. I said, "Oh, Jesus, take the wheel." I said, "But that's okay, baby. Enjoy that birthday cake. Daddy will just eat a piece of celery and watch you and pretend I'm eating it." But I made it. I got through it. It's not always easy. What's that? The Cheeto guy. It's not easy being cheesy. Let's pray. I'm just trying to warn you of what the Holy Spirit's telling me. You say, "Well, Brandon, I don't believe anything you said." That's fine. I'm not here to convince you of anything. I'm here to keep warning, beating my drum, doing what I feel the Lord's called me to do. And if you don't like what I'm saying... I get the letters in the mail. I get the emails. People don't like it; people telling me they believe we're going through the whole tribulation and writing me a whole book of how I'm so wrong in teaching all of you that I believe that the rapture of the church is about to happen. Then I have people say that there are all these different things and different theologies, and I say, "Where did they come up with this stuff?" Some YouTube people say, "I believe it this way." I say, "I don't see where that's in the Bible." And I talk to the elders and they think they're crazy and they say, "Well, that's fine." Everybody has a different way they interpret scripture. They do. So, I'm not here to argue theology with people. I try to follow people like Rick Renner and Billye Brim and Perry Stone, people that have some Greek study mixed in there. You can listen to what they're saying with the scripture and they add it and they put it together and I look and I go, "That makes sense." Put the Greek with the King James and I go, "Okay, I get it." Some people are so over my head I go, "Man, I got to hear that seven times." You know Charles Capps was a good one, too. He taught the end times well, and Hilton Sutton. But what I understood is that some of these big Bible teachers that taught that stuff didn't always agree with each other. And so this one taught that one, but they were friends and they agreed to disagree. They didn't beat each other down. They just kept walking. None of them are here. They all went home to be with the Lord, but they loved each other and they got along. People weren't in strife. Like I said, you can agree to disagree without having to be mean. So that's what I've learned with end-time theology. I just stay in my lane and try to just say what the Lord has told me to say. Now I've been reading John Bevere's book, 'The King is Coming,' A+. He believes what I believe. There is a rapture of the church. He believes it. And I believe it, too. And I think anybody that's been in my circle, you know, with Rick Renner and all these people, they all believe it—that Jesus is coming sooner than later. All I want to tell you every single time I come on here is that if you don't get anything else, you need to know there's a heaven to gain and a hell to shun. It's so important that you check your level. Where are you? Are you ankle deep? Are you waist deep? Are you knee deep? Are you over the head? Are you swimming at the bottom wherever Jesus is? Are you drinking that living water? Or are you stagnant? Have you become weary in well-doing? Are you backslidden? Are you cold? The Bible said he would rather you be hot or cold, but if you're lukewarm, he would speu you out of his mouth. There's so many people that are living in compromise right now. And as I've been listening to this young lady—I don't know her name, she was an ex-witch. She got born again and Jesus visited her as she was doing some kind of occultic practice. She gave her heart to Christ. She's telling everybody how to anoint their house with oil. I was so excited that this young woman was teaching people how to anoint their house with oil as an ex-witch. The Lord said, "Brendon, I'm coming after the occult. I'm coming after the witches. I'm coming after the warlocks. I'm coming after the seance people." I love them.
